# srta — additions on top of SpeedrunTool

# Mod Options (auto-generated menu)
MODOPTIONS_SRTA_TITLE=                          SpeedrunTool Additions
MODOPTIONS_SRTA_SHOWROOMTIMER=                  Show Room Timer
MODOPTIONS_SRTA_ONLYSHOWROOMTIMERWHENCOMPLETED= Only Show Timer When Run Completed
MODOPTIONS_SRTA_TOGGLEROOMTIMERVISIBILITY=      Toggle Room Timer Visibility
MODOPTIONS_SRTA_UNDOROOMTIMERPB=                Undo Latest Room Timer PB

# Popups
SRTA_UNDO_ROOM_TIMER_PB_TOOLTIP=                Restored the previous Room Timer PB
SRTA_UNDO_ROOM_TIMER_PB_DIALOG=
    [MADELINE left normal]
    Restored the previous room timer PB~
